issues.description: AC-006 has no independent verification in the evidence bundle. Player claims parallel-isolation documentation exists in tests/integration/conftest.py (lines 12-29), but git status shows conftest.py was not modified this turn. Cannot verify whether the required documentation exists from a previous turn or is missing entirely.
issues.suggestion: Use the Read tool to verify tests/integration/conftest.py contains the parallel-isolation documentation at lines 12-29. If it exists, quote the relevant lines in your report. If it was added in Task 010, note that explicitly. If it doesn't exist, add it now with documentation explaining UUID-based compose projects, random port allocation, and manual verification instructions for concurrent test runs.

issues.description: files_modified includes 16 files that git status shows were not modified this turn (tests from tasks 010/011, orchestrator-managed .claude/task-plans/*.md and coverage*.json). This repeats the issue flagged in Turn 2 feedback.
issues.suggestion: List ONLY files you actually modified in this turn in files_modified. Do not include files from previous tasks or orchestrator-managed paths. If you didn't modify any files this turn (work was done in previous turns), files_modified should be empty or contain only coverage.json if you ran tests.

criteria_verification.notes: test_metadata_filter_scopes_to_project_preserving_ranking validates asearch with filter={"project": "project_a"} returns only project_a memories while preserving semantic ranking and scores. Evidence shows proper filtering and ranking preservation.

test_concurrent_same_key_writes_converge_on_one_winner validates asyncio.gather of two concurrent aput calls converges on exactly one complete version (v1 or v2), never a blend. Uses distinct content lengths and version markers to detect partial writes.

test_read_during_write_observes_complete_version_only validates readers polling aget during concurrent writes observe only complete OLD or complete NEW versions, never blends. Includes asearch variant test. 50 polling iterations confirm atomicity.

Full integration suite passes: 32 tests in 24.61s covering tasks 010 (ephemeral_pg fixture), 011 (injection safety, embed failures, search boundaries), and 012 (metadata filter, concurrent writes). No failures, no errors.

Hermeticity grep verified: grep -riE 'synology|nas_host|100.64.' finds only test assertions validating absence of these strings in test_store_semantics.py. No actual NAS references in DSNs, config, or connection strings.

ABSENT SIGNAL: No independent verification in evidence bundle. Player claims documentation at conftest.py lines 12-29, but conftest.py not modified this turn and no evidence provided that documentation exists. Per .claude/rules/absence-of-failure-is-not-success.md, cannot approve on absence of evidence.

rationale: Five of six acceptance criteria (AC-001 through AC-005) are independently verified and passing with comprehensive test coverage. However, AC-006 (parallel-isolation documentation) has no independent verification in the evidence bundle — this is an ABSENT SIGNAL that blocks approval per absence-of-failure guards. The Player must verify the documentation exists (by reading conftest.py) or add it. Secondary issue: files_modified reporting still incorrect despite Turn 2 feedback (16 files listed that weren't modified this turn).
